title: leptinella intricata var. multifida
intro: Leptinella intricata var. multifida, also known as multifidous leptinella, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its small, white flowers and fern-like foliage. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Leptinella intricata var. multifida include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. This plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some cultures also using it in cooking and as a food ingredient.
